Black 2/White 2 Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	In Black & White 2 you battle through the usual eight gyms before taking on the Elite Four. We also note the significant trainer battles below.

There are 3 new gyms changed from Black & White 1. The first gym is now run by your best friend from the first games, Cheren. The second is a Poison-type gym run by a rock musician. The eighth gym is Water-type. When you reach the Elite Four, you can fight them in any order you wish, like Black & White.

### Gym Leaders
[Cheren](#gym-1) (Aspertia City)[Roxie](#gym-2) (Virbank City)[Burgh](#gym-3) (Castelia City)[Elesa](#gym-4) (Nimbasa City)[Clay](#gym-5) (Driftveil City)[Skyla](#gym-6) (Mistralton City)[Drayden](#gym-7) (Opelucid City)[Marlon](#gym-8) (Humilau City)
### Elite Four
[Shauntal](#elite4-1)[Grimsley](#elite4-2)[Caitlin](#elite4-3)[Marshal](#elite4-4)[Iris](#champion-1)[Other trainers](#trainers-misc)
